    1. Wall(int[])

Class Wall

java.lang.Object
generation.map.Cell
generation.map.Wall
Direct Known Subclasses:
LockedDoor
public class Wall extends Cell
Represents an impassable wall cell in the game map. Extends Cell with type "wall" and no coin.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Wall(int[] position)
    Constructs a new Wall cell at the given position.
